title: Senate GOP ready to drop Trump's $1 billion ballroom security ask
shortDescription: Senate Republicans appear ready to strip $1 billion in White House security funding tied to Donald Trump's ballroom in a blow to the president.

title: Fetterman remains opposed to ending US war in Iran as measure advances

title: Will President Trump attend Don Jr.'s wedding? Watch his response
shortDescription: President Donald Trump was asked May 21 if he is attending Donald Trump Jr.'s wedding. He said it was 'not good timing.' It's his son's second marriage.

title: Trump reverses Biden EPA refrigerant rule
